scenario: Valid scenario: a 16-year-old applicant's parent consents to a duplicate ID card after loss (reason 1.3, duplicateLostStolenOrMissing), with the Section 3 guardian-consent block filled (bounded 2-row table, only row 1 used here), a requestedFormLanguage alternate-script request (serbian, one of the 5 enumerated options), and the previous-document section reporting the lost card's last-known details.
